label.zh: 解绑后的运营商(英文版)

description.en: Bharti Airtel (India): outsourced network operations to Ericsson + Nokia Siemens, IT to IBM. Kept brand, retail, and customer relationships in-house. Economic engine is share-of-wallet growth.
description.zh: Bharti Airtel(印度):把网络运营外包给爱立信+诺基亚西门子,IT 交给 IBM。自己只留品牌、零售、客户关系。经济引擎是钱包份额增长。
